subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the pure Lord, who through His celestial bounty hath illumined the realm of the human heart and soul, and made resplendent the eternal universe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش پاک یزدانرا که ببخشایش آسمانی جهان دل و جان آدمیرا روشن و کیهان جاودان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun
